info.description: Game backend API với PlayFab integration, anti-cheat validation, và talent system
info.title: Hollow Wilds Backend API

get.description: Get audit log of all admin actions (admin only)
Search users by PlayFab ID, email, or username (admin only)

post.description: Manually adjust user's gold balance (admin only)
Ban a user with reason and optional duration (admin only)

get.description: Get ban history for a user (admin only)
Export all user data for GDPR compliance (admin only)
Get detailed profile for a specific user (admin only)

post.description: Remove active ban from a user (admin only)
Submit a batch of analytics events
Authenticate player with PlayFab ticket and get HW session JWT
Authenticate user with PlayFab session token and get JWT for API access
Get a new JWT using a refresh token

get.description: Get ranked entries for a specific metric and scope
Get current ranks for the authenticated player across all types

post.description: Submit a result after a run to update personal best and ranks

400.description: Value too low or invalid request

post.description: Submit level completion with anti-cheat validation

get.description: Get the full game state for the player

put.description: Persist the game state with version control

get.description: Get list of all save backups for the player
Retrieve all talents and their levels for the authenticated user

post.description: Upgrade a talent using gold currency

400.description: Invalid request, insufficient gold, or max level
